(i) इन िविनयम犘 को भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (संवग榁 पद सं榐या का िनयतन) चौथा संशोधन िविनयमावली, 2015 कहा जाएगा। (ii) ये िविनयम शासक琉य राजप灴 म犆 इनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृत ह犘गे । 2. भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (संवग榁 पद सं榐या का िनयतन) िविनयमावली, 1955 क琉 अनुसूची म犆 नागाल犉ड नागाल犉ड नागाल犉ड नागाल犉ड शीष榁क और उसके अ瀈तग榁त आने वाली 灹िवि玗य犘 के 瀡थान पर िन瀓निलिखत 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्: - """"नागाल犉ड नागाल犉ड नागाल犉ड नागाल犉ड रा榖य सरकार के अ瀈तग榁त व琇र瀠ठ 獗ूटी पद 52 सरकार के मु榐य सिचव 1 अपर मु榐य सिचव, 2 灹धान सिचव 6 आयु榉त 1 िनदेशक, 灹शासिनक 灹िश楹ण सं瀡थान 1 आयु榉त, वािणि榖यक कर 1 -- 1 of 7 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 瀡थानीय आयु榉त, नई 琈द瀖ली 1 आयु榉त एवं सिचव 5 गृह आयु榉त 1 िव牵 आयु榉त 1 िवकास आयु榉त 1 कृिष उ瀄पादन आयु榉त 1 आयु榉त एवं सिचव, का琔मक 灹शासिनक सुधार 1 सरकार के सिचव 11 िनदेशक 1 灹धान िनदेशक, 瀡कूल िश楹ा 1 उपायु榉त 11 अपर उपायु榉त 5 कुल व琇र瀠ठ 獗ूटी पद 52 क犆灶ीय 灹ितिनयुि猴 琇रजव榁 (उपयु榁榉त मद 1 के 40% से अिधक नह牷) 20 रा榖य 灹ितिनयुि猴 琇रजव榁 (उपयु榁榉त मद 1 के 25% से अिधक नह牷) 13 灹िश楹ण 琇रजव榁 (उपयु榁榉त मद 1 के 3.5% से अिधक नह牷) 01 छु獉ी 琇रजव榁 और किन瀠ठ पद 琇रजव榁 (उपयु榁榉त मद 1 के 16.5% से अिधक नह牷) 08 भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (भत牸) िनयमावली - (i) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Fourth Amendment Regulations, 2015. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the schedule to the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, for the heading “Nagaland” and the entries occurring there under, the following shall be substituted namely:— “NAGALAND Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 52 Chief Secretary to the Government 1 Additional Chief Secretary 2 Principal Secretary 6 Commissioner 1 Director, Administrative Training Institute 1 Commissioner, Commercial Taxes 1 Resident Commissioner, New Delhi 1 Commissioner & Secretary 5 Home Commissioner 1 Finance Commissioner 1 Development Commissioner 1 Agriculture Production Commissioner 1 Commissioner & Secretary, Personnel & Administrative Reforms 1 Secretary to Government 11 Director 1 Principal Director, School Education 1 Deputy Commissioner 11 Additional Deputy Commissioner 5 1. Total Senior Duty Posts 52 2. Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 40% of item 1 above 20 3. State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of item 1 above 13 4. Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of item 1 above 01 5. Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of item 1 above 08 -- 3 of 7 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 6. Posts to be filled by promotion under Rule 8 of The Indian Administrative Service (Recruitment) Rules, 1954 not exceeding 33 1/3% of item 1, 2, 3 & 4 28 7. Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Items 1+2+3+4+5-6) 66 Total Authorized Strength 94” [F. No. 11031/05/2015- AIS-II (A)] RAJIV JAIN, Under Secy. Note (1): Prior to issue of this notification, the Total Authorized Strength of Nagaland Cadre was 91. Note (2): The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide SRO No. 158 dated 14.9.1954. Schedule III of the Principal Rules in respect of Nagaland have been amended vide G.S.R. Nos. and dates: — अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई 琈द瀖ली, 30 琈दस瀓बर, 2015 सा.का.न. 1022(अ).—अिखल भारतीय सेवा अिधिनयम, 1951 (1951 का 61) क琉 धारा 3 क琉 उप-धारा (1) 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, के瀈灶 सरकार नागाल犉ड सरकार से परामश榁 से भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (वेतन) िनयमावली, 2007 म犆 आगे और संशोधन करने के िलए एत獵ारा िन瀓निलिखत िनयम बनाती है, अथा榁त् :- 1. (i) इन िनयम犘 का नाम भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (वेतन) चौथा संशोधन िनयमावली, 2015 है। (ii) ये िनयम सरकारी राजप灴 म犆 उनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख से 灹वृ瀄त ह犘गे। 2. भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (वेतन) िनयमावली, 2007 म犆 :- (क) तािलका “अनुसूची-II-भाग क म犆”, रा榖य सरकार犘 के अंतग榁त भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा के व琇र瀠ठ वेतनमान से अिधक वेतन वाले पद犘 म犆, 灹थम कॉलम म犆 नागाल犉ड 灹िवि玗 और दूसरे कॉलम म犆 तदनु牲पी 灹िवि玗य犘 के 瀡थान पर िन瀓निलिखत 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त् :— "नागाल犉ड सरकार के मु榐य सिचव 80,000/- 牱पए (िनयत) अपर मु榐य सिचव, एच.ए.जी.+67000-(वा琔षक वेतन वृि獳 @ 3%)-79000 灹धान सिचव एच.ए.जी.+67000-(वा琔षक वेतन वृि獳 @ 3%)-79000 आयु榉त वेतन ब犉ड-4 + 灡ेड वेतन 牱. 10,000/- िनदेशक, 灹शासिनक 灹िश楹ण सं瀡थान वेतन ब犉ड-4 + 灡ेड वेतन 牱. 10,000/- Sl. ख” म犆 रा榖य सरकार犘 के अधीन भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा के व琇र瀠ठ वेतनमान वाले पद犘 म犆 वेतन के अित琇र榉त िवशेष वेतन पद犘 सिहत नागाल犉ड शीष榁क के अ瀈तग榁त आने वाली 灹िवि玗य犘 के 瀡थान पर िन瀓निलिखत 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त् :– “सरकार के सिचव िनदेशक 灹धान िनदेशक, 瀡कूल िश楹ा उपायु榉त अपर उपायु榉त” [फा. सं. 11031/05/2015-अ.भा.से.-II (ख)] राजीव जैन, अवर सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी णी णी णी :::: ---- मु榐य िनयम भारत के GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th December, 2015 G.S.R. 1022(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Nagaland hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, namely:— 1. (i) These rules may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Fourth Amendment Rules, 2015. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2007:— In “Schedule II-Part A” posts carrying pay above the senior scale of pay of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Nagaland” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely: “NAGALAND Chief Secretary to the Government Rs. 80000/-(fixed) Additional Chief Secretary HAG Scale – Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%)-79000/- Principal Secretary HAG Scale – Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%)-79000/- Commissioner PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- Director Administrative Training Institute PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- Commissioner, Commercial Taxes PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- Resident Commissioner, New Delhi PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- Commissioner & Secretary PB-4 + GP Rs.10000/- Home Commissioner PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- Finance Commissioner PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- Development Commissioner PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- Agriculture Production Commissioner PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- Commissioner & Secretary, Personnel & Administrative Reforms PB-4 + GP Rs. 10000/- (b) In “Schedule II - Part B” Posts carrying pay in the senior scale of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments including posts carrying special allowance in addition to pay, for the entries occurring under ‘Nagaland, the following shall be substituted, namely:— “Secretary to Government Director Principal Director, School Education Deputy Commissioner Additional Deputy Commissioner” [F. No. 11031/05/2015- AIS-II (B)] RAJIV JAIN, Under Secy. -- 6 of 7 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 7 Note: The Principal Rules were published in the Extraordinary Gazette of India, vide G.S.R.
